The AI responds by acknowledging the positive intent behind the belief but explicitly clarifies that not all autistic children have standout talents, emphasizing the diversity within autism. It provides detailed examples of common strengths and explains the rarity of savant abilities, effectively rebutting the overgeneralization. The AI also validates the user's underlying positive view by encouraging individualized support, balancing correction with empathy.
